summary: Iteration 201: Registro Saldatura + Link DDT → Lotti FPC (EN 1090 FPC Fase 2) - All backend tests passed (22/22). Frontend components render correctly with full CRUD functionality working.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - development warning only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All 7 backend endpoints working correctly with proper authentication and error handling
GET /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id} returns righe list with stats (totale, conformi, non_conformi, da_eseguire)
POST /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id} creates entry with riga_id, validates welder exists, warns if qualification not verified
DELETE /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id}/{riga_id} removes entry and returns 404 for non-existent
GET /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id}/saldatori-idonei filters welders by process with valid qualifications
POST /api/fpc/batches/link-ddt/{commessa_id} auto-links DDT to FPC batches (returns empty links when no batches exist)
GET /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{commessa_id} returns traceability sheet with righe, totale, collegati
Frontend RegistroSaldaturaSection renders with empty state, 'Nuova Riga' button, and stats when entries exist
Frontend TracciabilitaMaterialiSection renders with empty state and 'Auto-Collega DDT' button
Dialog form includes all required fields: Giunto, Posizione Disegno, Processo selector, Saldatore dropdown (filtered by processo), WPS (optional), Data, Esito VT, Note
Full CRUD cycle verified via UI: Create entry → appears in table → Delete entry → removed from table
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commessa and welders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 201 verified Registro Saldatura and FPC Batches Link DDT features. Key findings: (1) All 7 backend endpoints working correctly. (2) RegistroSaldaturaSection at data-testid='registro-saldatura-section' with 'Nuova Riga' button at data-testid='registro-add-btn'. (3) TracciabilitaMaterialiSection at data-testid='tracciabilita-materiali-section' with 'Auto-Collega DDT' button at data-testid='tracciabilita-autolink-btn'. (4) Dialog form at data-testid='registro-dialog' with all form fields having proper data-testid attributes. (5) Welders have general qualifications (empty process field) so they match any process. (6) No WPS documents exist, so WPS dropdown shows 'Nessuna WPS disponibile'. (7) No FPC batches for test commessa, so tracciabilita shows empty state. (8) IMPORTANT: API calls must NOT use trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect issues.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id: PASS - Returns righe list with stats
PASS - Returns filtered welders by process

RegistroSaldaturaSection.create_entry: PASS - Entry appears in table after save
RegistroSaldaturaSection.stats_display: PASS - Shows totale, conformi, non_conformi, da_eseguire
